svg.title: TrueRender v4 pipeline with model architecture types
svg.desc: A vertical flowchart showing six stages with the model architecture used at each stage labeled. SAM 3 is a vision-language transformer with video memory, TripoSR is a transformer-based image-to-3D model, and other stages are either classical CV or serving infrastructure.
svg.text: Phone video to 3D mesh, with model architecture types

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Laplacian sharpness filter pick frames?')
sendPrompt('How does SAM 3 segment the object across frames?')
sendPrompt('How is the canonical frame selected and cropped?')
sendPrompt('How does TripoSR generate a mesh from one image?')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI demo serve?')
